features: Soft and Gentle: These cotton buds feature soft, absorbent tips that are gentle on sensitive areas.
Convenient Pack Size: The box contains 500 cotton buds, providing ample supply for regular use.
Versatile Application: Suitable for makeup removal, personal grooming, first aid, and various cleaning tasks.
Hygienic: Each cotton bud is individually wrapped, ensuring cleanliness and hygiene.
Easy Storage: The compact box design allows for convenient storage in bathrooms or travel bags.
description: Product description Introducing a convenient and hygienic solution for personal care needs: 500 cotton buds in a compact, eco-conscious package. These soft and absorbent cotton swabs are perfect for applying makeup, cleaning delicate areas, or grooming. Crafted with high-quality materials, they offer a gentle touch on sensitive skin. Whether for beauty routines or household tasks, these versatile cotton buds ensure precision and comfort. Embrace simplicity and practicality with this essential grooming accessory. Please note that proper disposal is recommended to minimise environmental impact. Safety Warning Safety: Includes a safety warning to not dispose of the product in toilets or drainage systems, promoting responsible use.
